definitions.Data Principal: The individual to whom the personal data relates.
definitions.Data Fiduciary: The person/organisation that alone or with others determines the purpose and means of processing personal data.
definitions.Data Processor: A person who processes personal data on behalf of a Data Fiduciary.
definitions.Personal Data: Any data about an individual who is identifiable by or in relation to such data.
definitions.Processing: Any operation on personal data (collection, storage, use, disclosure, erasure).
